x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business service maps provide the service context that Now Assist uses to answer "what business service is affected by this CI?" Without mapped services, Now Assist impact analysis stops at the CI level.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable and run Service Mapping for key business services via the Service Mapping workspace. Start with your top 10 most critical applications. Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist ITOM uses for impact analysis.
